infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FitSync uses the camera to scan the gym QR code for instant check-in.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: FitSync uses Face ID to unlock the app.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FitSync lets you attach transformation photos to your progress.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FitSync uses your location to show the gym branch nearest to you.
